extortion.description:
Grede is an independent company that designs, engineers, validates and manufactures high-quality ductile, gray and specialty iron castings for automotive, commercial and industrial markets. Headquartered in Southfield, MI, Grede offers complete precision machining and finishing services, as well as the assembly of diverse components into complete systems. It has 9 facilities in the U.S. with approximately 2,700 employees.

Website: https://www.grede.com/

Revenue : $814.7M

Address: 20750 Civic Center Dr Ste 100, Southfield, Michigan, 48076, United States

Phone Number: (248) 440-9500
